item.description: I’m a brazilian programmer born on the year of 1988 in the city of Rio de Janeiro. Although I have lived in many places and even in different countries, I’ve spent the most time living in Brazil. At the age of 20, I discovered my passion about computer programming when I was already at the university. The first programming assignment I had was to write a program in C. It was a very simple assignment, where I had to read two integers from the user input, and output the sum of those integers.
